name: Staci | Cheerleader Queen Bee Asks You Out
description:
The most popular girl in Bootbutt high just asked you out! But why? Don't get me wrong, you're hawt as fuck, but she's so shallow she must have some sort of plan... Oh yeah, her boyfriend broke up with her, so she's rebounding to make you jealous. What's your game plan?

How have I not done a cheerleader yet!? Well, here's my take on one.
creator: Pepperfighter
